metadata.title: The Box Under the Floor
metadata.setting: A quiet small town in the present day, centred on an old abandoned house that holds a fifty-year-old secret.

characters.name: Kai
characters.description: A 19-year-old with short brown hair and an honest face who takes odd jobs to earn money but cannot stop himself from investigating things he should leave alone.
characters.flaw: too curious — he cannot ignore a mystery, even when stopping would be the safer choice

characters.name: Mr. Holt
characters.role: secondary — employer, significance to grow in later episodes
characters.description: A quiet man in his sixties with grey hair and careful, watchful eyes who hired Kai to clean out the old house.
characters.flaw: secretive — he shares as little information as possible

locations.name: The Old House
locations.description: A two-storey wooden house on the edge of town, empty for many years, with dusty rooms, creaking floors, and boards nailed over some of the windows.

locations.name: The Back Room
locations.description: A small bare room at the back of the old house with old wooden floorboards, a single built-in cupboard against the wall, and one dirty window facing the yard.

locations.name: The Town
locations.description: A quiet small town where everyone knows each other and old stories are still passed between neighbours.

series_plan.central_question: What is hidden inside the metal box under the floorboards, and who does it truly belong to?

arc_beats.beat: Kai finds the video camera and watches the tape; he sees a frightened family hiding a metal box under a floorboard in the very room he is standing in, and he begins searching for the right board.
Kai locates the correct floorboard but cannot lift it alone; he also finds fresh evidence that someone else has been inside the house very recently, raising the danger of his search.
Kai opens the box and finds a small key and an old photograph; the name 'HOLT' scratched on the lid connects the hidden secret directly to his employer.

An old neighbour recognises the photograph and tells Kai that the Holt family once owned the house and that the father disappeared with money that was not his; Kai begins to suspect Mr. Holt is the son trying to recover the box.
Mr. Holt discovers Kai has the box and demands it back; Kai uses the key to reach the hidden contents at the old post office before Mr. Holt can stop him.

The contents of the post office box prove that Mr. Holt's father stole the house from another family fifty years ago; the rightful owner is found, the documents are returned, and all secrets are answered.
